(Erratum) Motion To Compel, Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $310 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
